title: Juicy Donabe Beef Wrap
description: A flavorful and hearty wrap filled with slow-cooked beef and served with fresh vegetables. Perfect for a satisfying dinner.
instructions: Marinate the beef in 1 tablespoon of pungent Syrian olive oil, 1 teaspoon of salt, and 1/2 teaspoon of black pepper for at least 30 minutes.
Preheat the donabe according to the manufacturer's instructions.
Cook the beef in the donabe over medium-high heat for 3-4 minutes per side, or until browned and cooked through.
Transfer the beef to a plate and let rest for 5 minutes before slicing into thin strips.
Warm the tortilla wrap in the microwave for 20-30 seconds or by wrapping it in a damp paper towel and heating in the donabe for 1-2 minutes.

Assemble the wrap by spreading a tablespoon of pungent Syrian olive oil on the tortilla, followed by a portion of cooked donabe rice, sliced beef, and desired toppings (cucumber, red onion, and cilantro).
